description: Mock application packet: a South Korean national resident-registered at an address in Gwacheon, Gyeonggi, currently living in Beijing, China, filing the overseas absentee voter notification (국외부재자신고서) so ballots for the next election can be prepared for postal/embassy voting. Field values transcribed verbatim from the NEC's own official filled-in example ('국외부재자신고서_작성 예시.pdf', ok.nec.go.kr) — fabricated illustrative name (홍길동 / HONG GIL-DONG is Korea's standard placeholder 'John Doe' name used on official specimen forms), not a real person. One exception: the example's submission-date line ('년 월 일') is left blank on the source specimen, so declarationDate below is a synthesized illustrative value, not a transcribed one.

data.overseasResidenceAddress: NO. 20. DONGFANGDONGLU CHAOYANG DISTRICT. BEIJING CHINA
